description: Korea's leading semiconductor test handler manufacturer. Global #1 in memory test handlers with ~70% market share. Key products: Memory/SOC Test Handlers, display inspection equipment, and CubeProber (HBM inspection equipment). Major customers: SK Hynix, Samsung Electronics. Also expanding into non-memory SoC test handlers and HBM test solutions. Founded 1980, incorporated 2002, KOSDAQ listed 2011.

competitors: ACCRETECH/Tokyo Seimitsu (CMP-0001) - adjacent competition in semiconductor test/probing equipment
Advantest (CMP-0005) - test equipment (complementary, handlers connect to testers)
_externalRelationships.notes: Market cap: 1,706.3B KRW. Global #1 test handler (70% share). CubeProber is a new wafer-level probing system for HBM inspection - directly competes with traditional wafer probers from Accretech and TEL. 2025 Q3 cumulative: revenue -9.1% YoY, operating profit -19.4%, but net profit +168.6%. HBM test equipment qualification with Micron underway. Beta 1.60 (high volatility). 52-week range: 26,050-69,050 KRW.

_metadata.dataSource: FnGuide, THE ELEC, Investing.com, Mirae Asset Securities
